generated_exposure.exposure_text: As someone who values order and duty, I'm glad to see our leaders prioritizing strategic autonomy. It's our responsibility to ensure national security without relying too much on unstable partners. The recent investments in domestic defense capabilities show we're taking this seriously. Let's keep supporting policies that put our security first! #NationalSecurity #StrategicAutonomy
